entities.name: First-principles thinking
entities.context: Reasoning approach that strips away emergent properties to identify core drivers of a phenomenon

entities.name: Hydrogen metaphor
entities.context: Framework for identifying the most fundamental, irreducible component that drives all other complexity in a system

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company where the Hydrogen principle should be applied to identify core hiring data

entities.name: Modular design
entities.context: Design principle where optimizing the base module proportionally increases entire system reliability

entities.name: Strategic drift
entities.context: Negative outcome when effort is spent on variations (isotopes) rather than fundamental components

relationships.context: Both describe the process of identifying irreducible core components
Should identify its Hydrogen - the core data point that makes a candidate hireable
Share the principle that optimizing foundational elements improves the whole system
Strategic drift occurs when the fundamental unit is not identified and prioritized
